sentences.english: I had to go to the dentist today because my tooth hurt.
sentences.korean: 이가 아파서 오늘 치과에 가야 했어요.

sentences.english: The dentist said I had a small cavity.
She filled it in just ten minutes.
It didn't hurt at all because she used a special gel.
sentences.korean: 특별한 젤을 사용해서 전혀 아프지 않았어요.

sentences.english: She told me to brush my teeth more carefully.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: History Lecture — The Fall of the Berlin Wall
